### Post by ikajava on 2008-01-21
&#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308; &#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316;&#4322;&#4312;:

&#4312;&#4322;&#4309;&#4312;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312; liveCD-&#4312;&#4311;..
&#4323;&#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4305; &#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4315;&#4312;&#4316;&#4304;&#4314;&#4321;

&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4316;&#4322;&#4304;&#4319;&#4308;&#4305; &#4328;&#4308;&#4316;&#4321; &#4314;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4325;&#4321;&#4312;&#4321; &#4318;&#4304;&#4320;&#4322;&#4312;&#4328;&#4308;&#4316;&#4321; /mnt-&#4328;&#4312;
&#4309;&#4311;&#4325;&#4309;&#4304;&#4311;, &#4314;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4325;&#4321;&#4312; &#4307;&#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4321;&#4322;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304; /dev/sda1 &#4322;&#4317;&#4315;&#4310;&#4308;

mount /dev/sda1 /mnt

&#4315;&#4308;&#4320;&#4308; &#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4321;&#4322;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305; GRUB-&#4321;

grub-install --root-directory=/mnt /dev/sda

&#4312; &#4309;&#4321;&#4312;&#4317;...
